CGAL::Deformation_Eigen_closest_rotation.name: CGAL::Deformation_Eigen_closest_rotation_traits_3
CGAL::Deformation_Eigen_closest_rotation.brief: A class to compute the closest rotation in Frobenius norm to a 3x3 Matrix using the Eigen library .
CGAL::Deformation_Eigen_closest_rotation.detailed: The internal computation relies on Eigen::JacobiSVD<> solver. Is model of DeformationClosestRotationTraits_3

CGAL::Deformation_Eigen_polar_closest_ro.name: CGAL::Deformation_Eigen_polar_closest_rotation_traits_3
CGAL::Deformation_Eigen_polar_closest_ro.brief: A class to compute the closest rotation in Frobenius norm to a 3x3 Matrix using the Eigen library .
CGAL::Deformation_Eigen_polar_closest_ro.detailed: The internal computation relies on a hybrid system using the solvers Eigen::SelfAdjointEigenSolver<> and Eigen::JacobiSVD<> (polar decomposition). Is model of DeformationClosestRotationTraits_3

CGAL::Surface_mesh_deformation.name: CGAL::Surface_mesh_deformation
CGAL::Surface_mesh_deformation.brief: Class providing the functionalities for deforming a triangulated surface mesh.
CGAL::Surface_mesh_deformation.detailed: TM a model of HalfedgeGraph VIM a model of ReadablePropertyMap with Surface_mesh_deformation::vertex_descriptor as key and unsigned int as value type. The default is boost::property_map<TM, boost::vertex_index_t>::type . HIM a model of ReadablePropertyMap with Surface_mesh_deformation::halfedge_descriptor as key and unsigned int as value type. The default is boost::property_map<TM, boost::halfedge_index_t>::type . TAG tag for selecting the deformation algorithm WC a model of SurfaceMeshDeformationWeights , with WC::Triangle_mesh being TM . If TAG is ORIGINAL_ARAP , the weights must be positive to guarantee a correct energy minimization. The default is the cotangent weighting scheme. In case TAG is ORIGINAL_ARAP , negative weights are clamped to zero. ST a model of SparseLinearAlgebraWithFactorTraits_d. If Eigen 3.2 (or greater) is available and CGAL_EIGEN3_ENABLED is defined, then an overload of Eigen_solver_traits is provided as default parameter. CGAL::Eigen_solver_traits< Eigen::SparseLU< CGAL::Eigen_sparse_matrix<double>::EigenType, Eigen::COLAMDOrdering<int> > > CR a model of DeformationClosestRotationTraits_3 . If Eigen 3.1 (or greater) is available and CGAL_EIGEN3_ENABLED is defined, Deformation_Eigen_polar_closest_rotation_traits_3 is provided as default parameter. VPM a model of ReadWritePropertyMap with Surface_mesh_deformation::vertex_descriptor as key and a point as value type. The point type must be a model of RawPoint_3 . The default is boost::property_map<TM, CGAL::vertex_point_t>::type .

members.definition: bool CGAL::Surface_mesh_deformation< TM, VIM, HIM, TAG, WC, ST, CR, VPM >::erase_roi_vertex

members.name: preprocess
members.brief: Preprocessing function that need to be called each time the region-of-interest or the set of control vertices are changed before calling deform() .
members.detailed: If not already done, deform() first calls this function. Advanced Collects the vertices not in the region-of-interest that are adjacent to a vertex from the region-of-interest (these vertices are internally considered as fixed control vertices). Then assembles and factorizes the Laplacian matrix used in the function deform() . A modification of the set of control vertices or the region-of-interest invalidates the preprocessing data. true if successful. A common reason for failure is that the system is rank deficient, which happens for example when all the vertices are in the region-of-interest and no control vertices are set, or if the weighting scheme used features too many zero and breaks the connectivity information.
members.definition: bool CGAL::Surface_mesh_deformation< TM, VIM, HIM, TAG, WC, ST, CR, VPM >::preprocess

members.name: deform
members.brief: Deforms the region-of-interest according to the deformation algorithm, using the target positions of each control vertex set by using rotate() , translate() , or set_target_position() .
members.detailed: The points associated to each vertex of the input triangle mesh that are inside the region-of-interest are updated. Nothing happens if preprocess() returns false . set_iterations(unsigned int iterations) , set_tolerance(double tolerance) , deform(unsigned int iterations, double tolerance)
members.definition: void CGAL::Surface_mesh_deformation< TM, VIM, HIM, TAG, WC, ST, CR, VPM >::deform

members.name: deform
members.brief: Same as deform() but the number of iterations and the tolerance are one-time parameters.
members.detailed: iterations number of iterations for optimization procedure tolerance tolerance of convergence (see explanations set_tolerance(double tolerance) )
members.definition: void CGAL::Surface_mesh_deformation< TM, VIM, HIM, TAG, WC, ST, CR, VPM >::deform

members.name: reset
members.brief: Resets the points associated to the vertices of the region-of-interest at their initial positions at time of the functor construction or after the last call to overwrite_initial_geometry() .
members.detailed: if the region-of-interest or the set of control vertices have been modified since the last call to preprocess() , it will be called prior to the reset.
members.definition: void CGAL::Surface_mesh_deformation< TM, VIM, HIM, TAG, WC, ST, CR, VPM >::reset

members.name: overwrite_initial_geometry
members.brief: Sets the initial positions of the vertices from the region-of-interest to the current positions.
members.detailed: Calling this function has the same effect as creating a new deformation object with the current deformed triangle mesh, keeping the region-of-interest and the set of control vertices. if the region-of-interest or the set of control vertices have been modified since the last call to preprocess() , it will be called prior to the overwrite. Advanced This function might have a non-negligible effect on the result. The Laplacian matrix of the free vertices and the optimal rotations are computed using the original positions of the points associated to the vertices. Thus, if a deformed version of the surface mesh is used as reference, the surface mesh properties the algorithm tries to preserve are those of an altered version (which are already degraded).
members.definition: void CGAL::Surface_mesh_deformation< TM, VIM, HIM, TAG, WC, ST, CR, VPM >::overwrite_initial_geometry

members.name: iterations
members.brief: Gets the default number of iterations (5) or the value passed to the function set_iterations() .
members.definition: unsigned int CGAL::Surface_mesh_deformation< TM, VIM, HIM, TAG, WC, ST, CR, VPM >::iterations

members.name: tolerance
members.brief: Gets the default tolerance parameter (1e-4) or the value passed to the function set_tolerance() .
members.definition: double CGAL::Surface_mesh_deformation< TM, VIM, HIM, TAG, WC, ST, CR, VPM >::tolerance

members.name: set_iterations

members.definition: void CGAL::Surface_mesh_deformation< TM, VIM, HIM, TAG, WC, ST, CR, VPM >::set_iterations

members.name: set_tolerance
members.brief: Sets the tolerance of the convergence used in deform() .
members.detailed: If tolerance ==0 , no energy based termination criteria is used (preventing to do the energy computation at each iteration step) tolerance > $|\mathrm{energy}(m_i) - \mathrm{energy}(m_{i-1})| / \mathrm{energy}(m_i)$ will be used as a termination criterium.
members.definition: void CGAL::Surface_mesh_deformation< TM, VIM, HIM, TAG, WC, ST, CR, VPM >::set_tolerance

members.name: set_sre_arap_alpha
members.brief: Sets the alpha coefficient that determines the weight of the bending term (rotation smoothness) for the SRE-ARAP deformation technique.
members.detailed: The range of values can be from 0 to infinity. When alpha=0, the method reverts to ARAP. When alpha is increased, neighboring rotations become similar to each other, where alpha=infinity results in a global rigid transformation of the ROI. The value of alpha depends on the surface area and shape. Since alpha is not too sensitive, it can be tweaked in most cases by multiplying it by powers of 10. The default value for alpha is 0.02.
members.definition: void CGAL::Surface_mesh_deformation< TM, VIM, HIM, TAG, WC, ST, CR, VPM >::set_sre_arap_alpha

members.name: region_of_solution
members.brief: Find region of solution, including roi and hard constraints, which is the 1-ring vertices out roi Contains four parts:
members.detailed: if there is any vertex which is no longer roi, set its position back to original position assign a ros id to vertices inside ros + ros-boundary reinitialize rotation matrices, if a vertex is previously ros, use its previous matrix, otherwise set zero reinitialize original, and solution, if a vertex is previously roi, then use its original position in old_original, else use point(). In both case we are using "original position" of the vertex. same for solution (it is required to prevent jumping effects)
members.definition: void CGAL::Surface_mesh_deformation< TM, VIM, HIM, TAG, WC, ST, CR, VPM >::region_of_solution

members.brief: Assemble Laplacian matrix A of linear system A*X=B.

DeformationClosestRotationTraits_3.name: DeformationClosestRotationTraits_3
DeformationClosestRotationTraits_3.brief: Concept describing the set of requirements for computing a 3x3 rotation matrix that is close to a given 3x3 matrix, together with basic computations used in the class CGAL::Surface_mesh_deformation . The definition of close depends on the model. The fact that some basic operations are hidden behind a function is to allow to benefit from optimizations like expression template from libraries used to implement models of this concept.

members.name: Matrix
members.brief: 3x3 matrix type having a copy constructor and an assignment operator
members.definition: typedef unspecified_type DeformationClosestRotationTraits_3::Matrix

members.name: Vector
members.brief: 3D vector type having a copy constructor
members.definition: typedef unspecified_type DeformationClosestRotationTraits_3::Vector

members.name: add_scalar_t_vector_t_vector_transpose
members.brief: Equivalent to result = result + w * (v1*v2^t) .
members.definition: void DeformationClosestRotationTraits_3::add_scalar_t_vector_t_vector_transpose
members.argsstring: (Matrix &result, double w, const Vector &v1, const Vector &v2)

members.name: add__scalar_t_matrix_p_scalar_t_matrix__t_vector
members.brief: Equivalent to result = result + (w1*m1 + w2*m2) * v .
members.definition: void DeformationClosestRotationTraits_3::add__scalar_t_matrix_p_scalar_t_matrix__t_vector
members.argsstring: (Vector &result, double w1, const Matrix &m1, double w2, const Matrix &m2, const Vector &v)

members.name: add_scalar_t_matrix_sum_t_vector
members.brief: Equivalent to result = result + w1 * (m1 + m2 + m3) * v .

members.argsstring: (Vector &result, double w1, const Matrix &m1, const Matrix &m2, const Matrix &m3, const Vector &v)

SurfaceMeshDeformationWeights.name: SurfaceMeshDeformationWeights
SurfaceMeshDeformationWeights.brief: Concept describing the set of requirements for calculating weights for halfedges.
SurfaceMeshDeformationWeights.detailed: Example: // a simple model to `SurfaceMeshDeformationWeights` concept, which provides uniform weights template < class TriangleMesh> struct Identity_weight { typedef TriangleMesh Triangle_mesh; template < class VertexPo int Map> double operator()( typename boost::graph_traits<TriangleMesh>::halfedge_descriptor /*e*/ , const TriangleMesh& /*p*/ , VertexPointMap /*v*/ ) { return 1.0; } };

members.name: Triangle_mesh
members.brief: a model of HalfedgeGraph
members.definition: typedef unspecified_type SurfaceMeshDeformationWeights::Triangle_mesh

members.name: SurfaceMeshDeformationWeights
members.brief: Default constructor. Required only if the default parameter is used in the constructor of CGAL::Surface_mesh_deformation .
members.definition: SurfaceMeshDeformationWeights::SurfaceMeshDeformationWeights

members.name: operator()
members.brief: Function computing the halfedge weight of halfedge he .
members.detailed: VertexPointMap a model of ReadWritePropertyMap with boost::graph_traits<Triangle_mesh>::vertex_descriptor as key and a 3D point from a CGAL Kernel as value type
members.definition: double SurfaceMeshDeformationWeights::operator()
members.argsstring: (boost::graph_traits< Triangle_mesh >::halfedge_descriptor he, const Triangle_mesh &triangle_mesh, VertexPointMap vpm)

PkgSurfaceMeshDeformationRef.name: PkgSurfaceMeshDeformationRef
PkgSurfaceMeshDeformationRef.detailed: Sébastien Loriot, Olga Sorkine-Hornung, Yin Xu, and Ilker O. Yaz This package offers surface mesh deformation algorithms which provide new positions to the vertices of a surface mesh under positional constraints of some of its vertices, without requiring any additional structure other than the surface mesh itself. Introduced in: CGAL 4.5 Depends on: PkgSolverInterface and thirdpartyEigen BibTeX: cgal:lsxy-tsmd-26a License: GPL Windows Demo: CGAL Lab Classified Reference Pages Main Class # CGAL::Surface_mesh_deformation Concepts DeformationClosestRotationTraits_3 RawPoint_3 SurfaceMeshDeformationWeights Algebraic Traits # CGAL::Deformation_Eigen_closest_rotation_traits_3 # CGAL::Deformation_Eigen_polar_closest_rotation_traits_3
